EntityColumnModifierResult Methods

One Identity Manager API Server

The EntityColumnModifierResult type exposes the following members.

Methods
  NameDescription
Apply
Applies the specified modifier to this modifier, so that constraints from both modifiers are combined. The specified modifier overrides this modifier where applicable.
